helpText:
Splitter

Splitters typically take in a single payload and split it into a number of smaller payloads that are sent to the downstream consumer one by one.
allowableProperties_comment: Note that the order of properties in this file dictates the order displayed on screen, unless propertyDisplayOrder is set, which will be used as the primary key

description.helpText: A more detailed description of the component that may assist in support.
